--- a/models/user.py
+++ b/models/user.py
@@ -4,4 +4,4 @@
 class User:
     def __init__(self, name, email, age):
         self.name = name

gold_annotations.issue: Typo: self.emal should be self.email — breaks all code accessing user.email.
